meta.overall_style: Aesthetic UGC product review with high-contrast, clean lighting and split-second visual demonstrations.
meta.color_grade: Bright, clean, slightly warm, high color saturation on reds and pinks.
meta.music_style: Upbeat, chill electronic pop background track with a steady, positive rhythm.
meta.vo_voice_feel: Female, mid-30s, warm, conversational, natural, confident, subtle European accent.

hook.first_1_5s: Rapidly switching nail colors on a single thumb to show variety instantly.
hook.technique: Visual pattern interrupt combined with an unexpected personal confession.
hook.why_it_works: The fast visual transitions grab attention, while the relatable age-based confession sparks curiosity.

persuasion_arc: Problem (Traditional press-ons are chunky, plastic, bad fit, pop off, fake)
Product Demo & Benefits (Reusable soft gel, natural look, easy application, 7 mins, 30 sizes, easy removal)

sound_design.mix_notes: Voiceover is prominent and clear. Music ducks slightly during voiceover lines. SFX are sharp but integrated.

structure_template.role: Grab attention with rapid visual changes and a relatable confession.
structure_template.what_to_put_here: Show rapid transitions of the product in use while stating an unexpected personal opinion.

structure_template.role: Highlight the flaws of traditional/competitor products.
structure_template.what_to_put_here: Show close-ups of competitor products failing (bad fit, breaking, looking fake) with negative visual cues.

structure_template.role: Introduce the product as the perfect alternative.
structure_template.what_to_put_here: Show clean packaging and smooth application of your product, emphasizing superior material quality.

structure_template.role: Demonstrate ease of use, variety, and durability.
structure_template.what_to_put_here: Show different design variants, step-by-step application, and easy removal process.

structure_template.role: Drive action with a special offer.
structure_template.what_to_put_here: Show the full starter kit and a clear discount badge with a strong call to action.
